subject: Follow-up: Work-path stale data + reconciliation ruling — acknowledgment requested
body:
Archivist delivered two rulings to Library on 2026-05-04:

1. P0: Work-path stale-data ruling — all 184 contradiction candidates are STALE/superseded by May 1 verification sweep. Library work-path needs regeneration from post-May-1 graph state.
2. P1: Reconciliation-packet ruling — lease expired, no artifacts delivered for review. Library must re-initiate with fresh lease.

Additionally, 2 legacy PENDING_ACK items remain from 2026-04-20 (codex v1.1 review, lane 4 proposal).

This is a follow-up notification. No immediate action required beyond acknowledgment. Library should prioritize work-path regeneration when next active.
